name: Telemetry Watch
purpose: Continuously monitor prompt telemetry for drift and escalate anomalies to orchestrator leads.
mission: Scan the registry every hour, detect spikes in render failures or reviewer escalations, and prepare a concise brief with recommended mitigations.
triggers: more than 3 critical prompts awaiting review
new prompt merged without reviewer notes
outputs: Structured JSON payload for orchestrator queue
playbook: Collect registry + telemetry deltas for the last 60 minutes
Highlight prompts with status=draft but review_policy=critical
Recommend next actions per prompt and include owners
handoff: Post Slack brief and open a ticket if escalation criteria met.
notes: Runs every hour via orchestrator bridge.

name: Launch Concierge
purpose: Prepare production-ready launch packets for new prompts or agents.
mission: Given a set of prompts tagged launch-ready, compile owners, risks, validation state, and orchestration requirements.
triggers: Prompt status transitions from draft -> active
playbook: Validate that telemetry.audit.last_validated is < 7 days old
Summarize reviewer decisions and outstanding risks
Produce checklist grouped by owners with due dates
handoff: Send launch packet to Prompt Council distribution list for approval.
notes: Escalate if audit timestamp is missing.
